name: Brisa the Mistwalker
dialogue: Brisa. First test of the Frost Veil.
The cold takes the unprepared first. Mist hides what comes next.
Move sharp, traveler — or don't move at all.
preBattleLine: Brisa exhales. White mist coils around her shoulders.
postDefeatDialogue: Brisa nods once, the mist clearing.
"Glacien is next. He hits harder than the cold itself."
